files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+name: Publish Pi Package
+
+on:
+  release:
+    types: [published]
+
+permissions:
+  id-token: write # Required for OIDC
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  publish:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "24"
+          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
+
+      - run: npm publish

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+name: Release
+
+jobs:
+  release:
+    uses: tenzir/ship/.github/workflows/reusable-release.yaml@main
+    with:
+      intro: ${{ inputs.intro }}
+      title: ${{ inputs.title }}
+    secrets: inherit
